Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not understandable as it contains a syntax error message instead of a visual representation. There are no symbols, icons, labels, or components visible to evaluate clarity.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is incomplete as it does not display any of the components or connections present in the ground truth diagram. It only shows a syntax error message.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram is not consistent with the ground truth diagram. It lacks any structural or semantic alignment due to the absence of visual elements and the presence of a syntax error.
